title: A malicious Chrome extension for Adobe Acrobat could let hackers access private WhatsApp chats
summary: If the victim 1) has the vulnerable version of the Adobe Acrobat Chrome extension installed; 2) has WhatsApp loaded in a separate tab; and 3) opens the malicious landing page, it could trigger the extension’s vulnerable code path and allow the attackers…
